type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Adding backup=False/backup_suffix='.bak' params to Image.save(). Need to add param handling near top of save() (params.pop) and a shutil.copy2 backup step in the open_fp branch (around 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)') before opening the file for write.

type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Adding dry_run param to Image.save() (src/PIL/Image.py ~line 2469-2591): when dry_run=True, skip opening/writing the real file (write to an in-memory io.BytesIO instead) but still run save_handler so format conversion/validation errors surface. Also adding test_dry_run in Tests/test_image.py.
